summary: Financial freedom is about being in control of your time, allowing you to live life as you choose, with enough resources to meet all your financial goals. Mrin Agarwal has educated 300,000+ investors.

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: This episode is really about your mix. Put in your numbers and see the equity, debt, gold and international split that actually fits you.

disclaimer: For education only. Nothing here is financial, investment, or legal advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Please consult a SEBI-registered investment adviser before making any decision.

seo.title: Essentials of Financial Planning with Mrin Agarwal
seo.description: Financial freedom is about being in control of your time, allowing you to live life as you choose, with enough resources to meet all your financial goals.

takeaways.text: Financial freedom, in Mrin Agarwal's framing, is about controlling your time and having enough to meet your goals, not chasing a number for its own sake.
Start financial planning early, especially for retirement, so compounding has more years to do the heavy lifting for you.
Equity mutual funds and NPS carry the long-term growth, while debt funds are there to keep your emergency money safe.
A step-up SIP, where you raise the amount you invest every year, gives late starters a realistic path to build wealth.
Knowing your own risk profile and diversifying your portfolio matters more than chasing last year's returns.
